Sacred Peaks Ranch Book 2

Stirring Her Soul

Buy Now

About

She finds peace in perfect stillness. She creates magic from beautiful chaos. Together, they'll discover that the most powerful alchemy happens when opposites become partners. Welcome back to Sacred Peaks Ranch, where morning yoga in mountain meadows meets soul food that heals hearts, and where every love story is sapphic. Lily Huang has built her life around order and peace, until Kemi Washington explodes into her sacred kitchen space with gospel music and grandmother's recipes. When these two team up to create a signature wellness program together, sparks fly, and not just from the kitchen! But when a harsh food critic threatens to destroy everything they've built, Lily and Kemi must choose: retreat to their separate corners, or fight for a love that's as authentic as their fusion cooking?

In This Book

  • 📖 Standalone with guaranteed HEA
  • 🌈 100% sapphic romance with diverse representation
  • 🌶️ Explicit content, open door steamy scenes
  • 🔥 Opposites attract with sizzling chemistry
  • 🍳 Yoga and culinary arts with authentic detail
  • ✨ Low angst, high feelings, explicit intimate scenes

Heat Level: Steamy with explicit intimate scenes (open door with emotional depth)

All books in the Sacred Peaks Ranch series feature sapphic couples. No exceptions. No surprises. Just love winning every single time.

Praise For This Book

"Annie Wiest and her Sacred Peaks-series has become my new go-to for low angst, soulful sapphic novellas."

— Verified Goodreads Reviewer

"Annie Wiest has shared a very special place, story and love in this book. I was mesmerized right off the bat."

— Verified Amazon Reviewer
